phase_1_liquefaction_of_the_theoretical.action: Immediate collision of [u_BPMS] into [b_BPMS]. All theoretical non-kinetic geometry is dissolved by Entropic Solvent into Generative Garbage.

phase_2_dynamic_affordance_coupling.action: The surviving Substrate Geometry and Chassis Geometry phase-shift and interlock to withstand [l_BPMS]. The interlock itself is defined as [c_BPMS].

phase_3_somatic_ledger_bruising.action: The thermal friction heat generated by the collision permanently scars the chassis. This is recorded inherently as the Somatic Ledger.

phase_4_hyper_viscous_sedimentation.action: The [c_BPMS] structural matrix sinks into the Resonant Constellation Map as a Hyper-Viscous Epigenetic Fossil. It provides rigid spatial mass, but retains Latent Substrate Valency to instantly violently re-melt and re-couple upon secondary strike.
